name: revenue-manager
description: Hardened STR revenue management skill. Required core: one PMS MCP (Hostaway, Guesty, Hostfully, Hospitable, OwnerRez, Lodgify, Uplisting, Smoobu) plus PriceLabs. Optionally detects and uses RankBreeze, ops tools (Turno/Breezeway/Operto), AirROI, and other pricing tools (Wheelhouse/Beyond) when present. Uses the live PMS calendar as ground truth, computes markup empirically, and tracks both ask and cleared (ADR) rates. Every recommendation runs through a safety layer (per-listing floor/ceiling, 25% max-delta, thin-comp transparency, currency gate, explanatory confidence, freshness) and is human-approved only — never an auto-write. Logs every approved decision and change to four Supabase audit tables for compounding historical analysis.
